scripts.build: cd landing-page && npm install && npm run build && cd ../web-prototype && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist/play && cp -r landing-page/dist/* dist/ && cp -r web-prototype/dist/* dist/play/
scripts.mobile:apk: cd web-prototype && npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug
